tabs.content:
.create-or-alter function Query(){
Carbon_Mapper_Raw
| mv-expand plume = items
| extend 
    id = tostring(plume.id),
    plume_id = tostring(plume.plume_id),
    gas = tostring(plume.gas),
    geometry_bbox = tostring(plume.geometry_json.bbox),
    geometry_type = tostring(plume.geometry_json.type),
    geometry_longitude = todouble(plume.geometry_json.coordinates[0]),
    geometry_latitude = todouble(plume.geometry_json.coordinates[1]),
    scene_id = tostring(plume.scene_id),
    scene_timestamp = todatetime(plume.scene_timestamp),
    instrument = tostring(plume.instrument),
    mission_phase = tostring(plume.mission_phase),
    platform = tostring(plume.platform),
    emission_auto = todouble(plume.emission_auto),
    emission_uncertainty_auto = todouble(plume.emission_uncertainty_auto),
    emission_cmf_type = tostring(plume.emission_cmf_type),
    gsd = todouble(plume.gsd),
    sensitivity_mode = tostring(plume.sensitivity_mode),
    off_nadir = todouble(plume.off_nadir),
    plume_png = tostring(plume.plume_png),
    plume_rgb_png = tostring(plume.plume_rgb_png),
    plume_tif = tostring(plume.plume_tif),
    con_tif = tostring(plume.con_tif),
    rgb_png = tostring(plume.rgb_png),
    plume_bounds_min_x = todouble(plume.plume_bounds[0]),
    plume_bounds_min_y = todouble(plume.plume_bounds[1]),
    plume_bounds_max_x = todouble(plume.plume_bounds[2]),
    plume_bounds_max_y = todouble(plume.plume_bounds[3]),
    plume_quality = tostring(plume.plume_quality),
    wind_speed_avg_auto = todouble(plume.wind_speed_avg_auto),
    wind_direction_avg_auto = todouble(plume.wind_direction_avg_auto),
    emission_version = tostring(plume.emission_version),
    processing_software = tostring(plume.processing_software),
    publication_sources = plume.publication_sources,
    is_offshore = tobool(plume.is_offshore),
    collection = tostring(plume.collection),
    cmf_type = tostring(plume.cmf_type),
    sector = tostring(plume.sector),
    status = tostring(plume.status),
    hide_emission = tobool(plume.hide_emission),
    published_at = todatetime(plume.published_at),
    modified = todatetime(plume.modified)
| summarize arg_max(modified, *) by id
| project-away plume, items
}

.execute GreenSky script <|
  .alter table Carbon_Mapper_Plumes policy update
  ```[{
      "IsEnabled": true,
      "Source": "Carbon_Mapper_Raw",
      "Query": "Query()",
      "IsTransactional": true,
      "PropagateIngestionProperties": false
  }]```

.execute database script <|
  .alter table Carbon_Mapper_Plumes policy update "[{\"IsEnabled\":true,\"Source\":\"Carbon_Mapper_Raw\",\"Query\":\"Query\",\"IsTransactional\":false,\"PropagateIngestionProperties\":true,\"ManagedIdentity\":null}]"


.show diagnostics

.alter table Carbon_Mapper_Plumes policy streamingingestion enable


.show table Carbon_Mapper_Plumes policy streamingingestion



Query


.show function ['vw_active_super_emitters']

// 1. Create mv_realtime_kpis (Core KPIs)
.create-or-alter  function with  (backfill=true) realtime_kpis ()
{
    external_table('gold_emission_events')
    | where detection_timestamp >= ago(30d)
    | summarize 
        total_events = count(),
        super_emitter_count = countif(emission_severity == "SUPER_EMITTER"),
        high_emitter_count = countif(emission_severity == "HIGH"),
        total_methane_loss_mcf = sum(total_methane_loss_mcf),
        total_financial_impact = sum(financial_impact_usd),
        avg_emission_rate = avg(emission_kg_per_hour),
        max_emission_rate = max(emission_kg_per_hour),
        critical_facilities = dcountif(facility_key, compliance_risk_score >= 7)
        by bin(detection_timestamp, 1h)
    | extend 
        avg_financial_impact = total_financial_impact / total_events,
        super_emitter_pct = round(100.0 * super_emitter_count / total_events, 1)
}

realtime_kpis() | count


// facility_metrics
.create-or-alter function  with (backfill=true) facility_metrics()
{
    external_table('gold_emission_events') 
    | join kind=inner external_table('dim_facility')  on $left.facility_key == $right.facility_key
    | where detection_timestamp >= ago(150d)
    | summarize 
        detection_count = count(),
        total_financial_impact = toint(avg(financial_impact_usd)),
        max_risk_score = max(compliance_risk_score),
        super_emitter_count = countif(emission_severity == "SUPER_EMITTER"),
        latest_date = max(detection_timestamp),
        avg_emission_rate = toint(avg(emission_kg_per_hour))
        by facility_key, facility_id, facility_name, operator, latitude, longitude
    |extend 
        is_new_emitter = case(
            super_emitter_count > 0 ,"No",
            "Yes"
        )
    |extend 
        Work_order_created = case(
            facility_key == 10 ,"Under Review",
            "Not Sure about that"
        )
    | extend 
        risk_category = case(
            max_risk_score >= 7, "CRITICAL",
            max_risk_score >= 5, "HIGH",
            max_risk_score >= 3, "MEDIUM",
            "LOW"
        ),
        priority_score =toint( (detection_count * 2) + (max_risk_score * 10) + 
                        (total_financial_impact / 1000))
    | order by priority_score desc
}

facility_metrics() 

// 3. Create mv_hourly_trends (Time series)
.create-or-alter function  with (backfill=true) hourly_trends ()
{
    external_table('gold_emission_events')
    | where detection_timestamp >= ago(60d)
    | summarize 
        event_count = count(),
        total_emissions = sum(emission_kg_per_hour),
        total_impact = sum(financial_impact_usd),
        super_emitters = countif(emission_severity == "SUPER_EMITTER")
        by hour_bin = bin(detection_timestamp, 1h)
    | extend 
        avg_emission_per_event = total_emissions / event_count,
        avg_impact_per_event = total_impact / event_count
}

// Verify:
hourly_trends | count


// 4. Create mv_equipment_failures (Equipment analysis)
.create-or-alter function  with (backfill=true) equipment_failures()
{
    external_table('gold_emission_events') 
    | join kind=inner external_table('dim_equipment')  on $left.equipment_key == $right.equipment_key
    | where detection_timestamp >= ago(30d)
    | where scada_anomaly_detected == 1
    | summarize 
        failure_count = count(),
        total_impact = sum(financial_impact_usd),
        avg_emission_rate = avg(emission_kg_per_hour),
        facilities_affected = dcount(facility_key)
        by equipment_type, manufacturer, criticality,equipment_id,equipment_key
    | order by failure_count desc
}

// Verify:
equipment_failures

external_table('gold_emission_events')
tabs.title: KPI Function

tabs.content:
// Function 1: Calculate emission severity score
.create-or-alter function EmissionSeverityScore() {
    external_table('gold_emission_events')
    | extend severity_score = case(
        emission_severity == "SUPER_EMITTER", 10,
        emission_severity == "HIGH", 7,
        emission_severity == "MEDIUM", 4,
        1
    )
    | project event_id, facility_key, severity_score, emission_severity
}

// Function 2: Calculate time windows (last 7d, 24h, 1h)
.create-or-alter function TimeWindowMetrics() {
    external_table('gold_emission_events')
    | extend 
        is_last_hour = iff(detection_timestamp >= ago(1h), 1, 0),
        is_last_24h = iff(detection_timestamp >= ago(24h), 1, 0),
        is_last_7d = iff(detection_timestamp >= ago(7d), 1, 0)
    | project event_id, facility_key, is_last_hour, is_last_24h, is_last_7d, 
              detection_timestamp, financial_impact_usd
}

// Function 3: Geospatial binning for heatmaps
.create-or-alter function GeospatialBins() {
    external_table('gold_emission_events')   
    | join kind = inner (external_table('dim_facility')  )
     on $left.facility_key == $right.facility_key
    | extend geo_hash = geo_point_to_s2cell(longitude, latitude, 12)
    | project event_id, facility_key, geo_hash, latitude, longitude, 
              emission_kg_per_hour, detection_timestamp
}



.create-or-alter function with (folder="RTI", docstring="Active super emitter events (30 days)") vw_active_super_emitters()
{
    external_table('gold_emission_events')
    | where emission_kg_per_hour > 0
    | where event_date >= ago(30d)
    | join kind=inner (
        external_table('dim_facility')
    ) on facility_key
    | project
        event_id,
        detection_timestamp,
        facility_name,
        operator,
        emission_kg_per_hour,
        financial_impact_usd,
        compliance_risk_score,
        action_status = iff(work_order_generated != "", "ASSIGNED", "PENDING"),
        risk_category = case(
            compliance_risk_score >= 7, "CRITICAL",
            compliance_risk_score >= 5, "HIGH",
            "MEDIUM"
        )
}


vw_active_super_emitters()



.show function ['facility_metrics']
tabs.title: Functions

tabs.content:
external_table('gold_emission_events') 
| join kind=inner external_table('dim_facility')  on $left.facility_key == $right.facility_key
| where detection_timestamp >= ago(100d)
| summarize 
    emission_count = count(),
    total_emissions = sum(emission_kg_per_hour),
    max_risk = max(compliance_risk_score),
    total_impact = sum(financial_impact_usd)
    by facility_name, latitude, longitude
| extend 
    intensity = case(
        total_emissions > 10000, "EXTREME",
        total_emissions > 5000, "HIGH",
        total_emissions > 1000, "MEDIUM",
        "LOW"
    )
| project 
    Facility = facility_name,
    Latitude = latitude,
    Longitude = longitude,
    Emissions = total_emissions,
    Events = emission_count,
    Risk = max_risk,
    Impact = total_impact,
    Intensity = intensity
tabs.title: GreenSky_Maps

tabs.content:
external_table('gold_emission_events')
| where detection_timestamp >= ago(100d)
| summarize 
    TotalDetections = count(),
    WorkOrdersGenerated = countif(work_order_generated != ""),
    SuperEmitters = countif(emission_severity == "SUPER_EMITTER"),
    TotalFinancialImpact = sum(financial_impact_usd)
    by Day = bin(detection_timestamp, 1d)
| extend 
    WorkOrderRate = round(100.0 * WorkOrdersGenerated / TotalDetections, 1),
    AvgImpactPerDay = round(TotalFinancialImpact / 1000, 0)
| project 
    Day,
    ['Total Detections'] = TotalDetections,
    ['Work Orders Generated'] = WorkOrdersGenerated,
    ['Super-Emitters'] = SuperEmitters,
    ['WO Generation Rate (%)'] = WorkOrderRate
| render timechart 
    with (
        title="Work Order Generation vs. Detections (30 Days)",
        xtitle="Date",
        ytitle="Count",
        legend=visible
    )
